description: Remove one or more files or directories recursively (like rm -rf). All files are snapshotted before removal so they can be restored via rollback. Use dry_run=true to preview. Use file_pattern for glob-based batch deletion. Example: {"paths": ["build/cache", "temp.log"]} or {"file_pattern": "*.tmp", "dry_run": true}
name: remove

paths.description: Array of file or directory paths to remove.

dry_run.description: If true, preview what would be removed without actually deleting.
